name: ReadMe
description: ReadMe developer hub and API documentation platform

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to ReadMe
2. Go to Configuration → API Key
3. Copy your API key
4. Paste it below as Basic Auth: run echo -n 'YOUR_API_KEY:' | base64 (or just paste the key — ReadMe supports it as Basic username)

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies ReadMe documentation hub is accessible

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Verifies ReadMe project access and team management
